## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Technical Details
- Modules/files changed:
- Hardware/targets affected:
- Protocols/interfaces affected:

## Validation
- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Manual hardware validation completed
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Risks and Mitigations
- Risk:
- Mitigation:

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets or credentials added
- [ ] Changes are scoped and reviewable
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventions
